MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. ACTION SETTLED. JUDGMENT FOR PLITF.$3,424.00 ANDFORFEITURE OF THE AGREEMENT AND RESTITUTUON OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, AT 1325 HAWES STREET SAN FRANCISCO CALIF. RESTITUTIOIN TO TAKE PLACE AT 5:00 P.M. ON OCT. 16, 2004.IF DEFT. EVELYN BROWN, CHARLES T. CARTWRIGHT, AND ANTHONY M. BROWN VACATE THE SUBJECT PREMISES AS AGREED, PLTIF. SHEFFIELD SHALL WAIVE THE SUM OIF 3,424.00 AND EACH SIDE SHALKL BEAR THEIR OWN COST AND ATTY. FEES. WITHIN 3 WEEKS AFTER DEFT. HAVE VACATED THE SUBJECT PREMISES, PLTIF. SHALL SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH THE COURT. IF DEFT. EVELYN BROWN, CHARLES T. CARTWRIGHT, AND ANTHONY M. BROWN FAIL TO VACATE THE SUBJECT PREMISES BY THE AGREED DATE, THE STAY SHALL BE LIFTED AND SAID JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLTIF EDWARD SHEFFIELD AGAINST DEFT. EVELYN BROWN, CHARLES T. CARTWRIGHT AND ANTHONY M. BROWN FROM THE SUBJECT PREMISES ANYTIME AFTER OCT. 16, 2004. VACATE TRIAL DATE . DEFT. EVELYN BROWN NOT PRESENT
(IN HOSPITAL). PLT IN PRO PER. DEFT CSL JUSTIN TURNER, ESQ. JUDGE PRO.TEM.ZADIK SHAPRIO CLERK(ALICE COOPER) REPORTED CSR JO ANN BRYCE. DEPT. 218 .
